mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, p."PRODUCT_TITLE" AS productName,
CASE WHEN c."BUYER_NUM" = #{memberNum} THEN seller."MEMBER_ID" ELSE buyer."MEMBER_ID" END AS otherName,
mp."FILE_NAME" AS otherProfileImage,
(SELECT "MESSAGE_CONTENT" FROM "TB_PRODUCTMESSAGE" WHERE "CHATROOM_NUM" = c."CHATROOM_NUM" ORDER BY "CREATETIME" DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastMessage,
(SELECT "CREATETIME" FROM "TB_PRODUCTMESSAGE" WHERE "CHATROOM_NUM" = c."CHATROOM_NUM" ORDER BY "CREATETIME" DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastMessageTime,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_PRODUCTMESSAGE" WHERE "CHATROOM_NUM" = c."CHATROOM_NUM" AND "SENDER_NUM" != #{memberNum} AND "IS_READ" = false) AS unreadCount
FROM "TB_PRODUCTCHAT" c
JOIN "TB_PRODUCT" p ON c."PRODUCT_NUM" = p."PRODUCT_NUM"
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" buyer ON c."BUYER_NUM" = buyer."MEMBER_NUM"
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" seller ON c."SELLER_NUM" = seller."MEMBER_NUM"
LEFT JOIN "MEMBER_PROFILE" mp ON mp."MEMBER_NUM" = CASE WHEN c."BUYER_NUM" = #{memberNum} THEN c."SELLER_NUM" ELSE c."BUYER_NUM" END
WHERE c."BUYER_NUM" = #{memberNum} OR c."SELLER_NUM" = #{memberNum}
ORDER BY COALESCE( ( SELECT "CREATETIME" FROM "TB_PRODUCTMESSAGE" WHERE "CHATROOM_NUM" = c."CHATROOM_NUM" ORDER BY "CREATETIME" DESC LIMIT 1 ), c."CREATETIME" ) DESC

SELECT m.*, m."SENDER_NUM", m."MESSAGE_TYPE" AS type, u."MEMBER_ID" AS senderName FROM "TB_PRODUCTMESSAGE" m JOIN "TB_MEMBER" u ON m."SENDER_NUM" = u."MEMBER_NUM" WHERE m."CHATROOM_NUM" = #{chatroomNum} ORDER BY m."CREATETIME" ASC
